name: wedding-video-netflix-sample
description: Netflix-style wedding profile video built with Remotion - sample data version

scripts.build: npx remotion render src/index.ts V2-Netflix-Sample out/v2-netflix-sample.mp4
scripts.build:hq: npx remotion render src/index.ts V2-Netflix-Sample out/v2-netflix-sample.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18
